messagePlaceholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
fileSearchPlaceholder: Search files or folders in this directory and subdirectories
interrupted: Interrupted current response. You can continue with more context.
stoppedEditable: Session stopped. Adjust working directory or model, then click "+ New Session".
restored: Session restored · Send a message to continue
cliInstallDesc: No CLI detected. Install Claude Code with npm (requires Node.js 18+):
cliInstallHint: Run the command in a terminal, or click the button below to install automatically.
cmdCopyFailed: Copy failed. Please select and copy the command manually
cliInstalling: Installing... (this may take a few minutes)
cliInstallFailed: Install failed. Run the command manually in a terminal to see details
cliInstallNpmMissing: npm not found. Please install Node.js 18+ first
cliInstallInProgress: An install is already in progress
cliInstallTimeout: Install timed out. Check your network and retry, or install manually
cliInstallNotDetected: Install command finished, but no CLI was detected. Restart the server and retry
notifyWhenUnfocused: Notify when work completes while unfocused
allowLanAccess: Allow devices outside localhost to access this GUI
lanAccessEnabled: LAN devices can now access this GUI
lanAccessDisabled: Devices outside localhost are now blocked
notifyPermissionDenied: Notification permission is not enabled. Allow notifications in your browser settings.
notifyUnsupported: This browser does not support system notifications
confirmDeleteSession: Delete session "{title}"? This permanently removes its local transcript file and cannot be undone.
remoteDiagHint: Use SSH in read-only / read-write mode
remoteKeyHint: Either fill the key path above, or paste the private key content here.
remoteKeySaved: Key already saved — leave blank to keep it, or paste new content to replace.
remotePasswordHint: The SSH user's login password. Uses the system ssh client — no extra dependency.
remotePasswordSaved: Password already saved — leave blank to keep it.
remoteAuthFailed: Authentication failed — check the password / key.
remoteNoteUsage: Pick a target under runtime settings before starting a session. The agent will inspect that host through SSH tools instead of the local machine.
remoteNoteReadonly: Default is read-only mode (logs, status, sysinfo). Enable "Allow remote writes" to let the agent run changing commands; every remote command is written to ~/.ccb/remote_audit.log.
remoteNotePrereq: The target only needs an SSH server. Use key-based auth and a least-privilege account; restrict its sshd to this machine.
remoteNoTargets: No remote targets yet. Click the button below to add one.
remoteSshMissing: ssh client not found on this machine
